fields.description: Internal column key used in JSON output (e.g. days_duration)
fields.label: Field Name

fields.description: Display label. Defaults to title case of field name when empty.
fields.label: Label

fields.description: SQL expression. Use {fieldname} for row value. Table names auto-get 'tab' prefix (Event -> tabEvent). E.g. SELECT a,b FROM Child WHERE parent = {name}.
fields.label: SQL Expression

fields.description: Tint color for this column (e.g. female count=46 gets pink). Male=blue, Female=pink. Blank=no tint.
fields.label: Gender

fields.description: Placeholder for presentation rules (future: HTML/JS to render result)
fields.label: Format
